_meta.purpose: Extension C hand-curated Open Dental mapping. Consumed by praxis_deid/extractors/c_*.py to produce schedule_capacity_raw.csv at de-id time. Derived from expected_mapping_open_dental.json + expert audit. DO NOT regenerate from the wizard — the wizard's output is 78% reliable per the Wizard-1 validation gate (commit 6b19ae9). Hand-edits to this file MUST cite the Open Dental manual page they are based on.

provider_id.notes: For provider-grain rows, ProvNum is direct.

chair_id.notes: For chair-grain rows, join schedule -> scheduleop -> operatory and group by OperatoryNum. The mapping should produce a UNION ALL of provider-grain and chair-grain rows.

productive_hours.source_expression: (SELECT SUM(appointment.AptLength) / 60.0 FROM appointment WHERE appointment.ProvNum = schedule.ProvNum AND DATE(appointment.AptDateTime) = schedule.SchedDate AND appointment.AptStatus = 2)
productive_hours.notes: Sum AptLength for completed (AptStatus=2) appointments matching the row's grain. Note: AptLength is in minutes in modern Open Dental but legacy installs use 5-minute increments — verify with practice.

notes: Output is a UNION ALL of provider-grain (via schedule.ProvNum) and chair-grain (via scheduleop.OperatoryNum) rows.
